name: vscode-mcp-json-workspacefolder-relative
tags: vscode, mcp.json, copilot, workspaceFolder, dev prod worktree, stdio server config, task:186af167
body:
claude-hooks-dev/.vscode/mcp.json registers the claude-hooks stdio MCP server using ${workspaceFolder} instead of a hardcoded path (e.g. /Users/debaditya/workspace/claude-hooks-dev).

Why: this repo is developed as a git worktree (dev branch at claude-hooks-dev, prod/main branch at claude-hooks). A hardcoded path would need editing every time the config is copied between worktrees; ${workspaceFolder} makes the same file work unmodified in both.

How to apply: when adding VS Code / Copilot MCP configs for repos that use the dev/test/main worktree pattern, always prefer ${workspaceFolder}-relative command/args over absolute paths.
